school_quality.conclusion: School produced usable atoms with the classification shown.
school_quality.debt: Strengthen School content generation: less one-topic scaffold, more source-backed reusable lessons, gap/validator/repair patterns, negative examples, and quality gates.

known_gaps_next_actions: Build batch-drain: combine valid AgentLife packets into one merge instead of one packet per publish cycle.
Add live negative reject-delete proof: invalid/no-delta/rule-copy packet is rejected and deleted immediately, keeping only compact metric.
Add validator/proof that AIMO sees fresh memory after every School batch of 100 atoms.
Strengthen School: Codex-authored campaign pack with sources, coverage audit, level plan, and quality gate before big runs.
Add runtime retention for School run raw intermediate/staging after PASS while preserving final reports/hash proofs.
do_not_forget: Do not claim two independent active-memory throats. Current correct model is one commit throat, School priority, AgentLife queue/drain.
Do not rerun School/AIMO until next slice is built/validated unless Owner explicitly asks.
Do not clean active compact memory root. It is protected.
Do not keep rejected full packets; delete after compact metric.
Do not treat School atom quality as fully solved; it is useful but still weak/narrow.
